name: Undecylenate
description: Undecylenate is an unsaturated fatty acid that is mainly used in the production of Nylon-11. It is also used as a precursor in some pharmaceutical products,personal hygiene products, cosmetics, and perfumes. Zinc undecylenate is a topical antifungal agent that treats skin infections such as athlete’s foot and relieves itching, burning, and irritation associated with the skin condition. Because it is a bifunctional compound, undecylenate is also used as a linking molecule to conjugate other biomolecules such as proteins.
